div.head: The Ambassador in China (Johnson) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
371. T. V. Soong accompanied by Donald returned to Nanking by air yesterday. It is believed that T. V. is returning to Sian today possibly accompanied by Madame Chiang Kai-shek.Mr. Soong, Mme. Chiang, and W. H. Donald left by airplane for Sian that day. Neither Donald
nor T. V. brings very good news from Sian. Donald is reported to have said that real power at Sian is Yang Hu Cheng; that question of Chiang’s release might be settled except for the uncertainty of Yang’s attitude and those under him.
Sent to the Department, code texts to Peiping and Tokyo by mail.
